pageDescription: Calculate fielding independent pitching (FIP) for baseball players

placeholders.inningsPitched: Enter innings pitched (e.g., 6.1 for 6 innings and 1 out)
placeholders.leagueERA: Enter league average ERA (optional for context)

definition.title: Fielding Independent Pitching
definition.description: A statistic that measures a pitcher's performance based only on events entirely under their control

components.title: FIP Components
components.description: Measures home runs, walks, hit batters, and strikeouts - events not affected by fielding

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides FIP calculations only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Complete pitching evaluation should consider additional metrics and context

importantNotesList: FIP focuses on events under pitcher's control: HR, BB, HBP, and K
Does not account for balls in play, which are influenced by fielding
A lower FIP indicates better pitching performance
FIP should be compared to ERA for insights about fielding impact

messages.enterInformation: Enter pitching statistics to calculate FIP
messages.resultMessage: Your FIP calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides FIP calculations based on standard baseball statistics formulas. Complete pitching evaluation should consider additional metrics, context, and sample size factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Baseball Resources
seekHelp.content: For comprehensive baseball pitching analysis and player evaluation, consult baseball reference sites, sports analytics resources, or professional scouts and analysts.

errors.homeRuns: Please enter a valid number of home runs
errors.walks: Please enter a valid number of walks
errors.hitByPitches: Please enter a valid number of hit by pitches
errors.strikeouts: Please enter a valid number of strikeouts
errors.inningsPitched: Please enter a valid number of innings pitched
errors.leagueERA: Please enter a valid league average ERA

tooltips.homeRuns: Number of home runs allowed by the pitcher
tooltips.walks: Number of walks (bases on balls) issued by the pitcher
tooltips.hitByPitches: Number of batters hit by pitch by the pitcher
tooltips.strikeouts: Number of strikeouts recorded by the pitcher
tooltips.inningsPitched: Total innings pitched, including partial innings (e.g., 6.1 for 6 innings and 1 out)

enter_pitching_statistics_to_calculate_f: Enter pitching statistics to calculate Fielding Independent Pitching (FIP)
home_runs_allowed_by_the_pitcher_3: Home runs allowed by the pitcher
base_on_balls_issued_by_the_pitcher_5: Base on balls issued by the pitcher
lower_fip_indicates_better_pitcher_perfo: Lower FIP indicates better pitcher performance
custom_cfip_calculated_from_league_stati: Custom cFIP calculated from league statistics
fielding_independent_pitching_fip_evalua:
Fielding Independent Pitching (FIP) evaluates a pitcher's performance based only on outcomes
                        they can directly control: home runs, walks, hit batters, and strikeouts. It removes the
                        influence of fielding and luck.
fip_era_defense_may_have_hurt_pitcher_63: FIP < ERA: Defense may have hurt pitcher
fip_era_defense_may_have_helped_pitcher_: FIP > ERA: Defense may have helped pitcher
average_fip_is_typically_around_420_vary: Average FIP is typically around 4.20, varying by season and league.
